zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Steeton於1271年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾斯卡波洛時，她的父親Richard de Steeton32歲，母親Mrs. Richard de Steeton26歲。她於大約1291年與Robert Ughtred在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1347年之後在英國英格蘭越可爾英格曼東普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Steeton于1271年出生在英国英格兰越可爾斯卡波洛时，她的父亲Richard de Steeton32岁，母亲Mrs. Richard de Steeton26岁。她于大约1291年与Robert Ughtred在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1347年之后在英国英格兰越可爾英格曼東普。

nameMeanings.name: Steeton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Steeton was born in 1271, in Scarborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Steeton, was 32 and her mother, Mrs. Richard de Steeton, was 26. She married Robert Ughtred about 1291, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1347, in Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Steeton est née en 1271, à Scarborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Steeton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard de Steeton, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Ughtred environ 1291, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1347, à Ingmanthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Steeton 1271 in Scarborough, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Steeton 32 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Richard de Steeton 26. Sie hat um 1291 in Yorkshire, England Robert Ughtred geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1347 in Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Steeton è nata il nel 1271 nel Scarborough, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard de Steeton, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Richard de Steeton, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Robert Ughtred circa 1291, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1347, nel Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Steetonが1271年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスカーボロウで生まれた時，父Richard de Steetonは32歳，母Mrs. Richard de Steetonは26歳であった。約1291年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでRobert Ughtredと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1347年以後にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアイングマンソルペで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Steeton(이)가 1271년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스카버루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Steeton(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Richard de Steeton(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1291년 영국 요르크실르에서 Robert Ughtred(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1347년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 잉먼소에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Steeton nasceu em 1271, em Scarborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Steeton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard de Steeton, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Ughtred aproximadamente 1291, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1347, em Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Steeton родилась в 1271 г. в местности скарбороую, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Steeton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard de Steeton, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Ughtred около 1291 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1347 г. в местности ингмантаурп, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
